name: BizerOS Dash
short_desc: BizerOS dashboard — drag-and-drop tile layout for your self-hosted services with 40+ integrations.
author: kelsi-bizer
description: BizerOS Dash is the home-screen dashboard for your BizerOS install. It's a fork of Homarr customised for the Bizeros ecosystem: a drag-and-drop tile layout, 40+ first-party integrations (status pings, media servers, download clients, smart-home, calendars, weather, RSS, etc.), 10K+ built-in app icons, and credentials-based authentication out of the box. No YAML to write — every layout, board, and integration is configured in the web UI. Internally bundles its own Redis instance and a SQLite application database, so this app installs as a single container.

form_fields.label: Secret Encryption Key
form_fields.hint: Auto-generated 32-byte (64-hex-char) key used to encrypt integration credentials BizerOS Dash stores in its database. Lose or change it and every saved integration secret becomes unreadable.
